channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Sam Altman says AI is displacing jobs, but some companies are blaming it for layoffs they would've made anyway - Business Insider
item.description:
1. Sam Altman says AI is displacing jobs, but some companies are blaming it for layoffs they would've made anyway  Business Insider
  2. Sam Altman says the quiet part out loud, confirming some companies are ‘AI washing’ by blaming unrelated layoffs on the technology  Yahoo Finance
  3. 'AI-washing' is the newest C-suite trend as layoffs rise. Here's what you need to know  qz.com
  4. Sam Altman: 'We’ll find better things to do', says OpenAI CEO Sam Altman on AI's job market impact  Storyboard18
  5. AI Summit | 'OpenClaw: The Most Exciting Thing To Happen In AI' | Sam Altman | N18S | CNBC TV18  LinkedIn

item.title: The $30,000 Ford Electric Truck Might Be the Affordable Rivian You’ve Been Waiting For - The Drive
item.description:
1. The $30,000 Ford Electric Truck Might Be the Affordable Rivian You’ve Been Waiting For  The Drive
  2. Ford's Affordable EV Will Have Just 2 Structural Parts. The Maverick Has 146  PCMag
  3. Ford plans for more affordable vehicles after the $30,000 EV pickup  Electrek
  4. Ford’s $30,000 Compact Electric Pickup Truck Borrows Notes from F1 Testing, Tesla Gigacasting  Road & Track
  5. Ford to follow Tesla Cybertruck with electrical tech in new EV pickup  CNBC
